meaning: n.厄尔巴岛(位于意大利西岸)
examples: He accompanied Napoleon to the Island of Elba.
Two hours afterwards he came on deck, as the boat was about to double the Island of Elba.
Then there was Idris Elba, a British film icon praised for his role as a warlord in Beasts of No Nation.
In 1815, Napoleon left the island of Elba to begin his second conquest of France.
The island of Elba, the largest in the Tuscan archipelago, is a 260km drive and 15km ferry ride north of Rome.
